tiers.description: Canonical VCO-owned or locally rewritten assets that are part of normal distribution.
Repo-local mirrors or retained upstream assets kept for audit, comparison, or simplified operator workflows, but not shipped by default.
External dependency, service, CLI, or library that may be used by operators but is not distributed as core repo content.
Governance, methodology, corpus, or advisory source retained as a reference, not as distributable runtime content.
